title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.11.12 - Fix crash when Swap (Upstage, Body Double, Give and Take, Role Reversal) transferred a base-game debuff like Weak; swapping your Constant Struggle Weak now works.
